project.name: UNDRGRND Movement
project.tagline: Foundational movement for body and mind

dance.name: Afro Groove Foundations
dance.short_description: Beginner-friendly dance fitness inspired by Afrobeat and groove-based styles
dance.full_description: Afro Groove – Foundations is a beginner-friendly dance fitness class designed to improve rhythm, coordination, and full-body movement in a structured and supportive environment. Inspired by Afrobeat and groove-based styles, this class focuses on simple, repeatable movement patterns that build lower body strength, core stability, and overall mobility. Suitable for adults with no prior dance experience, sessions include guided warm-ups, easy-to-follow sequences, and controlled movement training to develop confidence and body awareness.
core_focus: Hip mobility & control - improves flexibility + reduces stiffness
Lower body strength and core stability
who_its_for: Adults with no prior dance experience
Anyone looking to start dance fitness
what_to_expect: Guided warm-ups to prepare your body
Full-body workout with emphasis on lower body

dance.name: Movement Dance
dance.short_description: Build body flow and confidence through expressive movement

dance.name: Recovery Movement Dance
dance.short_description: Safe return to movement after injury, fatigue, or long inactivity
dance.full_description: Recovery Movement Dance is a specialized program designed for individuals recovering from injury, surgery, or physical and emotional stress. This class provides a safe, supportive environment for those returning to movement after extended periods of inactivity. Medical clearance is required before participation to ensure your safety and wellbeing.
core_focus: Slow, mindful movement with controlled range of motion
Prevention of isolation through guided support
dance.medical_requirements: Medical clearance from your healthcare provider is required before participating in this program. Please bring documentation to your first class.

pole.name: Pole Fitness Foundations
pole.short_description: Learn how to use the pole safely with grip basics and simple spins
pole.full_description: Pole Fitness Foundations is designed for complete beginners who want to learn pole fitness in a safe, supportive environment. This class teaches you the fundamentals of pole work, including grip techniques, basic spins, and body positioning. No prior experience is necessary – just come ready to learn and have fun while building strength and coordination.
core_focus: Walking around the pole with proper technique
pole.client_outcome: I understand the pole and feel safe using it
what_to_expect: Learning to walk around the pole confidently

pole.name: Pole Flow
pole.short_description: Create smooth transitions and flowing movement around the pole
pole.client_outcome: I can move around the pole smoothly and confidently
pole.prerequisite: Pole Fitness Foundations or instructor approval

pole.name: Pole Strength & Movement
pole.short_description: Build conditioning, holds, and controlled movement on the pole
pole.prerequisite: Pole Fitness Foundations or instructor approval

yoga.name: Yoga Fusion
yoga.short_description: Modern fusion of traditional yoga with contemporary movement

yoga.name: Traditional Yoga
yoga.short_description: Classic yoga practices rooted in traditional techniques

yoga.name: Modern Yoga
yoga.short_description: Contemporary approach to yoga for today's lifestyle

yoga.name: Aerial Yoga
yoga.short_description: Experience yoga suspended in silk hammocks

aerial.name: Aerial Silks
aerial.short_description: Learn to dance and perform acrobatics on suspended fabric silks
aerial.full_description: Aerial Silks is a beautiful and challenging form of aerial acrobatics where you learn to climb, wrap, and create stunning shapes using suspended fabric. This beginner-friendly class teaches you the fundamentals of aerial work in a safe, supportive environment. No prior experience is necessary – our instructors will guide you through each skill progression, helping you build strength, flexibility, and confidence as you learn to fly.
core_focus: Upper body and core strength development
Safe mounting, dismounting, and falling techniques
Flexibility and grace in aerial positions
who_its_for: Complete beginners curious about aerial arts
Adults looking for a unique fitness challenge
Those wanting to build upper body strength
People who want to overcome fear and build confidence
what_to_expect: Progressive skill building from ground work to aerial
Individual attention and spotting from instructors
Cool-down and stretching to prevent injury
A supportive community of fellow aerialists

choreography.name: Choreography Fusion
choreography.short_description: Women's movement and confidence through choreographed dance

yoga.name: Kids Aerial Yoga
yoga.short_description: Playful aerial yoga in hammocks for kids

pole.name: Pole Fitness Kids - Foundations
pole.short_description: Gymnastics-style pole fitness for strength and coordination
pole.note: Taught in gymnastics style - focused on strength, coordination, and safety

aerial.name: Kids Aerial Silks
aerial.short_description: Introduction to aerial arts on suspended silks

dance.name: Dance Moves (Urban Mix)
dance.short_description: Hip hop and urban dance styles for kids

dance.name: Modern Contemporary (Rhythm & Motion)
dance.short_description: Expressive contemporary dance focusing on rhythm and movement quality

dance.name: Creative Dance
dance.short_description: Imaginative movement and dance exploration for younger children

filtered_booking_urls.note: Class Manager does not support filtered URLs - all buttons link to main calendar

legal.medical_disclaimer: Medical clearance from your healthcare provider is required before participating in Recovery Movement classes. By booking this class, you confirm that you have obtained appropriate medical clearance and that your healthcare provider has approved your participation in physical movement activities.
legal.general_disclaimer: All classes at UNDRGRND Movement are conducted by qualified instructors. Participants engage in physical activities at their own risk. Please inform your instructor of any injuries, medical conditions, or physical limitations before class. We recommend consulting with your healthcare provider before beginning any new exercise program.
legal.liability_waiver: By participating in classes at UNDRGRND Movement, you acknowledge that physical activity involves inherent risks. You agree to follow all safety instructions provided by instructors and to practice within your own limits. UNDRGRND Movement, its instructors, and staff are not liable for any injuries sustained during participation in classes or use of facilities.
legal.privacy_policy_summary: UNDRGRND Movement collects personal information necessary for class bookings and communication. We comply with the Australian Privacy Principles under the Privacy Act 1988. Your information is stored securely and never shared with third parties without your consent.
legal.covid_policy: We maintain hygiene protocols in accordance with Queensland Health guidelines. Please do not attend class if you are unwell or experiencing COVID-19 symptoms.

philosophy.mission: UNDRGRND Movement stands for foundational movement for body and mind. Not competition. Not performance pressure. Personal transformation only.
unique_approach: Classes held in multiple environments: studio, park, beach, and specialized spaces
Focus on individual ability and health condition rather than age restrictions
Integration of recovery and rehabilitation principles
Collaborative programs with registered counsellors for deeper integration

instructor.name: Ollie
instructor.title: Movement Practitioner & Performance Coach
instructor.bio_short: Ollie is a certified movement practitioner specializing in foundational movement, recovery practices, and performance coaching. With qualifications in yoga instruction and trauma-informed movement, Ollie creates safe, inclusive spaces for personal transformation through dance, pole, aerial, and recovery movement.
instructor.philosophy: Movement is not tied to a room or a schedule. It's about creating space for your body to reconnect with itself – whether that's in the studio, at the beach, or in the park. Every body is welcome, every level is supported, and every journey is honored.
